ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(OR( SBQQ__Quote__r.RecordType.Name = 'Container GENSET Quote', SBQQ__Quote__r.RecordType.Name = 'Container NT Quote'), NOT(ISNEW()), OR(ISPICKVAL(SBQQ__Quote__r.CONTAINER_Status__c, 'Order/Pending for Job #'), ISPICKVAL(SBQQ__Quote__r.CONTAINER_Status__c, 'Job # Issued'),ISPICKVAL(SBQQ__Quote__r.CONTAINER_Status__c, 'ASO Released'),ISPICKVAL(SBQQ__Quote__r.CONTAINER_Status__c, 'SO Released'),ISPICKVAL(SBQQ__Quote__r.CONTAINER_Status__c, 'Lost'),ISPICKVAL(SBQQ__Quote__r.CONTAINER_Status__c, 'Cancelled')),NOT($Permission.Restrict_All_Except_CAM_and_CS))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are not allowed to make any changes as quote converted to order.
